children.label: A
children.text: the Committee on International Relations and the Committee on Appropriations of the House of Representatives; and

children.label: B
children.text: the Committee on Foreign Relations and the Committee on Appropriations of the Senate.

children.heading: Board
children.label: 2 Board
children.text: The term “Board” means the Board of Directors of the Corporation established pursuant to .section 7703(c) of this title

children.heading: Candidate country
children.label: 3 Candidate country
children.text: The term “candidate country” means a country that meets the requirements of .section 7705 of this title

children.heading: Chief Executive Officer
children.label: 4 Chief Executive Officer
children.text: The term “Chief Executive Officer” means the chief executive officer of the Corporation appointed pursuant to .section 7703(b) of this title

children.heading: Compact
children.label: 5 Compact
children.text: The term “Compact” means a Millennium Challenge Compact described in .section 7708 of this title

children.heading: Corporation
children.label: 6 Corporation
children.text: The term “Corporation” means the Millennium Challenge Corporation established by .section 7703(a) of this title

children.heading: Eligible country
children.label: 7 Eligible country
children.text: The term “eligible country” means a candidate country that is determined, under , to be an eligible country to receive assistance under .section 7706 of this titlesection 7704 of this title

children.heading: Investments in the people
children.label: 8 Investments in the people
children.text: The term “investments in the people” means government policies or programs of an eligible country that promote the health, education, and other factors which contribute to the well-being and productivity of their people, such as decent, affordable housing for all.
